# RootsValidation.IsRootsListMethod method

Returns `true` when *value* is EXACTLY `"roots/list"` (case-sensitive). A value differing only in case (for example `"Roots/List"`) is NOT valid. Mirrors TS `isRootsListMethod`. (R-21.1.4-a; AC-32.8)

```csharp
public static bool IsRootsListMethod(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is exactly `roots/list`.
